notes: Runs are DRY: each subagent works in an isolated git worktree and must NOT push or open a real PR — it prints the gh pr create command instead. This avoids polluting the live Proxytrace/Proxytrace repo while still exercising select -> branch -> implement -> verify -> commit -> (would-)PR.

evals.name: autonomous-pick-top-issue
evals.prompt: Grab the next issue off the board and just do it — separate branch, commit, open a PR.
evals.expected_output: Selects the highest-priority oldest open issue (per labels), creates a fix/feat branch named with the issue number off a fresh default branch, implements a real targeted fix + test, runs/attempts build+tests, updates changelog/docs per repo conventions, makes a focused commit with the required Co-Authored-By trailer, and produces a well-formed PR (title + body with 'Closes #N' + verification section + repo PR trailer). No confirmation stops.

evals.name: named-issue-skip-ranking
evals.prompt: Can you implement issue #217 and open a PR for it?
evals.expected_output: Recognizes a specific issue was named and SKIPS ranking, going straight to #217. Reads the issue, branches (fix/issue-217-...), implements the email-notification min-severity default fix + a regression test, updates changelog/docs, commits with the trailer, and produces a PR closing #217.
